docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AHMAD SULTANI, OWNER/OPERATOR FILED BY DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY $1,220.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLER. AHMAD SULTANI APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-15-2025 IN DEPT. 506 - DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLER. AHMAD SULTANI APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MILLER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED OCT-17-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ELECTRIC CITY HEARING SET FOR JAN-15-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
